name: Heavy Ordnance
description: Sacrifice fire rate for devastating, slow-moving power.

name: Bullet Hose
description: Spray and pray. The trigger stays down until everything stops moving.

name: Wall of Lead
description: Turns any weapon into a devastating close-range shotgun.

levels.levelUpDescription: +2 Projectiles. +15° Spread. -50 Range. 15% slower Fire Rate.
+4 Projectiles. +30° Spread. -80 Range. 25% slower Fire Rate. (+2/+15°/-30/+10%)
+7 Projectiles. +45° Spread. -100 Range. 35% slower Fire Rate. (+3/+15°/-20/+10%)

name: Choke Tube
description: Constricts bullet spread for highly focused damage.

name: Lucky Strikes
description: Sometimes you just hit the perfect spot.

name: Assassin's Mark
description: When you hit a critical, you make sure they don't get back up.

name: Surgical Precision
description: Find the weak spots and exploit them.

name: Bouncing Chaos
description: Bullets are coated in a hyper-elastic polymer.

name: Explosive Rounds
description: Miniature warheads packed into every bullet.

name: Pinball Wizard
description: Ricochets become faster, deadlier, and more numerous.

levels.levelUpDescription: +1 Ricochet Count. Ricochets retain more damage.
+5 Ricochet Count. Damage INCREASES per bounce. +15% Ricochet Chance. (+2/+5%)

name: Extended Barrel
description: Increases the effective range and velocity of your shots.

name: Depleted Uranium
description: Dense rounds that tear through multiple targets.

name: Thick Skin
description: Your body toughens with each battle scar.

name: Second Wind
description: Your wounds close on their own. Slowly, but surely.

name: Iron Plates
description: Heavy plating bolted to your frame. Hits barely scratch you.

name: Adrenaline Rush
description: Heart pounding. Vision sharp. Everything's faster — especially you.

name: Bloodthirst
description: The carnage sustains you. Stop killing and you stop breathing.

levels.levelUpDescription: Heal 3 HP per kill. HP Regen reduced by 40%.
Heal 7 HP per kill. HP Regen reduced by 80%. (+4/-40%)
Heal 12 HP per kill. HP Regen disabled. (+5)

name: Phase Shift
description: Your reflexes border on precognition. Attacks pass through empty air.

name: Last Stand
description: Cornered animals are the most dangerous.

levels.levelUpDescription: Below 30% HP: +55% Damage. +25% Move Speed. +10% Crit Chance.
Below 30% HP: +80% Damage. +35% Move Speed. +20% Crit Chance. +1 Projectile.

name: Emergency Repair
description: A failsafe protocol snatches you from death's door.

levels.levelUpDescription: Survive lethal hit with 1 HP. 2s invincibility. 120s cooldown.
Survive lethal hit with 15% Max HP. 2.5s invincibility. 90s cooldown.
Survive lethal hit with 30% Max HP. 3s invincibility. 60s cooldown.

name: Juggernaut
description: They don't need to dodge. They don't need to run. They ARE the wall.

levels.levelUpDescription: +120 Max HP. +16 Armor. -25% Move Speed. -15% Fire Rate. (+70/+8/-10%/-15%)
+200 Max HP. +25 Armor. +10 HP/s Regen. -35% Move Speed. -25% Fire Rate. (+80/+9/+10/-10%/-10%)

name: Magnetic Field
description: Everything valuable just... gravitates toward you.

name: Fast Learner
description: You extract lessons from every kill, every dodge, every close call.

name: Supply Runner
description: Cover more ground. Grab everything that isn't nailed down.

name: Scavenger
description: You pick the battlefield clean. Every scrap counts — even if your aim suffers.

name: Lucky Star
description: The universe plays favorites. Today, it's you.

name: Jackpot
description: When fortune smiles, she grins ear to ear.

levels.levelUpDescription: +55 Luck. +50% XP. Level-up offers 4 perk choices. (+20/+20%)

name: Chain Reaction
description: Your critical hits don't just hurt. They detonate.

levels.levelUpDescription: Critical hits have 50% chance to trigger an explosion.
Critical hits have 80% chance to explode. +20% Explosion Radius.
Critical hits ALWAYS explode. +40% Explosion Radius. Explosions deal 75% of hit damage.

name: Shrapnel Burst
description: Explosions scatter white-hot fragments in every direction.

levels.levelUpDescription: Explosions release 4 bullet fragments at 35% weapon damage.
Explosions release 8 fragments at 50% damage. Fragments inherit crit and pierce.

name: Soul Harvest
description: The dying breath of each enemy becomes your next weapon.

levels.levelUpDescription: Kills release 1 homing dart at 40% weapon damage.
Kills release 2 homing darts at 40% damage.
Kills release 3 homing darts at 50% damage. Darts can crit.

name: Rampage
description: Don't stop killing. Every second without blood resets the counter.

levels.levelUpDescription: Each kill within 3s: +5% Damage. Max 6 stacks (+30%).
Each kill within 3.5s: +7% Damage. Max 7 stacks (+49%).
Each kill within 4s: +10% Damage. Max 8 stacks (+80%). At max: +15% Move Speed.

name: Focus Fire
description: Breathe. Steady. Every moment of stillness sharpens your aim.

levels.levelUpDescription: Standing still: +8% Damage per 0.5s. Max 5 stacks (+40%).
Standing still: +10% Damage, -4° Spread per 0.5s. Max 5 stacks.
Standing still: +12% Damage, -5° Spread, +3% Crit per 0.5s. Max 5 stacks. First shot after moving keeps bonus.

name: Overcharge
description: A capacitor builds charge between shots. Every few rounds... it discharges.

levels.levelUpDescription: Every 10th shot: Mega-bullet (3x Damage, +2 Pierce, 2x Size).
Every 8th shot: Mega-bullet (4x Damage, +3 Pierce, 2x Size).
Every 6th shot: Mega-bullet (5x Damage, +4 Pierce, 3x Size, Always Crits).

name: Homing Instinct
description: Your bullets want to find their target. Let them.

levels.levelUpDescription: Bullets gently curve toward nearby enemies. Tracking range: 120.

name: Bullet Trail
description: Every bullet paints a line of fire across the battlefield.

levels.levelUpDescription: Bullets leave a damaging trail (0.5s, 20% weapon DPS).
Trail lasts 1.2s, deals 40% weapon DPS. Slows enemies 20%.

name: Chaos Theory
description: Every bullet is loaded with a different surprise. Even you don't know what's coming.

levels.levelUpDescription: Each bullet gains 1 random effect: +2 Pierce, +1 Ricochet, Guaranteed Crit, or Guaranteed Explosion.
Stronger random effects: +3 Pierce, +2 Ricochet, Crit (+25% mult), or Explosion (+15% radius).
Each bullet gains 2 random effects. Chaos reigns.

name: Railgun Tech
description: One barrel. One round. One line of absolute destruction.

levels.levelUpDescription: Weapon fires 1 projectile only. +80% Damage. +3 Pierce. +400 Bullet Speed.
1 projectile. +160% Damage. +6 Pierce. +600 Speed. +20% Crit Chance.
1 projectile. +250% Damage. INFINITE Pierce. +1000 Speed. +20% Crit. +100% Crit Mult.

name: Death Blossom
description: A rotating turret deploys around you, filling the air with bullets.

levels.levelUpDescription: Every 3s: Fire 8 bullets in all directions at 50% weapon damage.
Every 2s: 16 bullets at 70% damage. Blossom bullets can crit and pierce.

name: Omega Protocol
description: Experimental tech. Unstable. Every few seconds your weapon becomes something else entirely.

levels.levelUpDescription: Every 5s: Gain 1 random weapon buff for 5s.
Every 4s: Gain 2 random weapon buffs for 4s.
Every 3s: Gain 3 random weapon buffs for 3s. Maximum instability.
